MAP.COMMENT: Init. Port field protected due to interface object types conflicts

Values.value: Gateway %instanceName% already exists, nothing to do.
Update operation for gateway with name %instanceName% failed, message was: %zz.config.mft.gateway:declareLocals/updateOutcome/message%
